repos.name: linux
repos.description: Linux kernel source tree

repos.name: superpowers

repos.name: ECC
repos.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

repos.name: javascript-algorithms
repos.description: 📝 Algorithms and data structures implemented in JavaScript with explanations and links to further readings

repos.name: tensorflow
repos.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

repos.name: claw-code
repos.description: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

repos.name: n8n
repos.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

repos.name: ohmyzsh
repos.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

repos.name: vscode
repos.description: Visual Studio Code

repos.name: AutoGPT
repos.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

repos.name: flutter
repos.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

repos.name: hermes-agent
repos.description: The agent that grows with you

categories.label: New This Month
categories.description: Repositories created in the last 30 days gaining traction

repos.name: ds4
repos.description: DeepSeek 4 Flash local inference engine for Metal and CUDA

repos.name: CodexPlusPlus
repos.description: An enhanced tool for CodexApp, striving to make Codex better to use and more comfortable 一个CodexApp的增强工具，努力让Codex变得更好用更舒服

repos.name: odysseus
repos.description: Self-hosted AI workspace.

repos.name: html-anything
repos.description: ✨ The agentic HTML editor — your local AI agent writes the HTML, you ship it. 🚀 75 Skills × 9 Surfaces (magazine · deck · poster · XHS / tweet · prototype · data report · Hyperframes) 🛡️ Sandboxed preview · 📤 1-click to WeChat / X / Zhihu / HTML / PNG 🔑 Zero API key — Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / Gemini / Copilot / OpenCode / Qwen / Aider.

repos.name: zerolang
repos.description: The programming language for agents

repos.name: bumblebee
repos.description: Read-only developer endpoint scanner for on-disk package, extension, and developer-tool metadata, built to check exposure to known software supply-chain compromises.

repos.name: zero-native
repos.description: Build desktop + mobile apps with Zig and web UI

repos.name: osiris
repos.description: Open Source Global Intelligence Platform - Real-Time OSINT Dashboard - A Palantir Alternative

repos.name: SkillOpt
repos.description: SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.

repos.name: cheat-on-content
repos.description: You're reading this. The skill predicted it. A workflow that turns every post into a calibrated experiment—score, blind-predict, retro, evolve. The future doesn't reward effort, it rewards those who see the pattern first. 1M followers in a month — not luck, system.

repos.name: a-stock-data
repos.description: A股全栈数据工具包 — 7层架构 · 28端点 · 13数据源 · 零第三方依赖 | Full-stack China A-Share data toolkit for AI coding assistants

repos.name: mirage
repos.description: A Unified Virtual Filesystem For AI Agents

repos.name: PilotDeck
repos.description: Task-oriented AI Agent productivity platform

repos.name: 3DCellForge
repos.description: AI-powered interactive 3D model generation, inspection, and presentation studio.

repos.name: yao-open-prompts
repos.description: Yao Open Prompts：中文 AI 提示词库，覆盖工作、学习、内容、营销和生活场景

repos.name: beautiful-html-templates
repos.description: A library of HTML slide templates designed so any coding agent can pick the right one and produce a beautiful deck on the user's behalf, automatically.
